title: Just Loot Bundles
description: A simple mod that adds a probability to obtain bundles of different rarities with useful loot upon killing mobs.
body: A simple mod that adds a probability to obtain bundles of different rarities with useful loot upon killing mobs. The stronger the mob is, the better will be the chances of getting a bundle and also the chances of having a better tier bundle.  #####  (The strength of a mob is based on how much max hp it has)   There are the 5 basic bundle tiers from worse to best dropped by regular enemies :   #### ( The loot in the pictures below is just an example and it may be worse or better)   Common ![Common Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97e40605e96ff4734e3d60f7ae64b6fac4b32e38.png) Uncommon ![Uncommon Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57dc9d15baaa3c6adf911457b0515bb65a95a918.png) Rare ![Rare Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df173430dcda1ebf20c535bea40de0245a85d45d.png) Epic ![Epic Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ca206da52c686130f9dcb6a176c4ea2935b7919.png) Legendary ![Legendary Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad99905a7e2fc1f8adbf7921b6514bff60c37970.png)   Colored Bundles are only available after 1.21.4, so before this version you have to pick them up to see the tier.   Mob specific bundles : Warden loot ![Warden Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e2a54916025bf40c51f1558f6eb7e85d3b8461e.png) Illagers can drop "stolen villager loot"   The better the rarity is the better the loot inside will be. More content will be added to this mod with mob-specific drops
